# Sanskritly

> Sanskritly is a free web app for learning Sanskrit through graded stories, grammar lessons, vocabulary flashcards, and sacred texts including the Bhagavad Gita and Upanishads. It supports both Devanagari script and IAST romanization.

Sanskritly is designed for learners at all levels — from complete beginners learning the Devanagari alphabet to advanced readers exploring classical texts. All content is free. The app works offline as a Progressive Web App (PWA) and is also available on iOS and Android.

## Core Learning Features

- [Stories](https://sanskritly.com/story): Graded Sanskrit stories (beginner through advanced) with word-by-word translations, vocabulary popups, and audio pronunciation
- [Grammar](https://sanskritly.com/grammar): Structured grammar lessons covering pronouns, verb conjugation, nouns, vibhakti (cases), tenses, and more
- [Flashcards](https://sanskritly.com/flashcards): Vocabulary flashcards with Devanagari, IAST, and English meanings
- [Sentence Drill](https://sanskritly.com/drill): Interactive sentence practice with fill-in-the-blank and match-pairs exercises
- [Dictionary](https://sanskritly.com/dictionary): AI-powered Sanskrit dictionary with example sentences and grammatical analysis
- [Alphabet](https://sanskritly.com/alphabet): Interactive Devanagari alphabet learning with stroke animations and audio

## Sacred Texts

- [Bhagavad Gita](https://sanskritly.com/gita): All 18 chapters with Sanskrit, transliteration, and English translation
- [Upanishads](https://sanskritly.com/upanishads): Principal Upanishads with commentary
- [Sacred Texts](https://sanskritly.com/texts): Collection of Sanskrit hymns, stotras, and classical passages

## Additional Resources

- [Listen](https://sanskritly.com/listen): Sanskrit audio — All India Radio news bulletins and DD News Sanskrit broadcasts
- [Course](https://sanskritly.com/course): Structured Sanskrit course for beginners

## Optional

- [sitemap.xml](https://sanskritly.com/sitemap.xml): Full site map
- [robots.txt](https://sanskritly.com/robots.txt): Crawling instructions
